title: GasTown town.toml manifest
description: Declarative topology manifest for a Gas Town instance (ADR-0001). Parsed by town-ctl and written to Dolt desired_topology tables.

version.description: Manifest format version. town-ctl refuses to apply an unknown version.

includes.description: Glob patterns for per-rig TOML fragments resolved before Dolt write. Merge semantics defined in dgt-cfi.

rig.description: Array of rig definitions. Each rig is a Git repository + agent pool.

name.description: Unique slug identifier for this Gas Town instance.

home.description: Path to the Gas Town home directory. Supports ${VAR} interpolation.

TownAgents.description: Gas Town-level agents that run alongside gt.

RigDefaults.description: Default values inherited by every rig unless overridden.

mayor_model.description: Default Claude model ID for Mayor agents.

polecat_model.description: Default Claude model ID for Polecat agents.

max_polecats.description: Default maximum Polecat pool size per rig.

SecretsConfig.description: Secrets resolved by town-ctl at apply time. Values are env-var interpolation expressions. Never written to Dolt (ADR-0001, Decision 4).

file.description: Path to an external secrets TOML file (gitignored). Supports ${VAR} interpolation.

RigSpec.description: A single Gas Town rig: one Git repository and its agent pool.

name.description: Unique slug identifier for this rig. Used as the primary key in desired_rigs.

repo.description: Absolute path to the Git repository root. Supports ${VAR} interpolation.

enabled.description: Whether this rig is active. A disabled rig causes the Surveyor to drain and stop all its agents.

formula.description: Scheduled Formula workflows for this rig.

AgentConfig.description: Agent role configuration for a rig. Absence of a role field means that role is disabled. Role interdependency: witness=true requires mayor=true.

mayor.description: Enable the Mayor agent (long-lived human interface).

witness.description: Enable the Witness agent (Polecat supervisor). Requires mayor=true.

refinery.description: Enable the Refinery agent (merge queue, conflict resolution).

deacon.description: Enable the Deacon agent (health daemon, coordinates Dogs).

mayor_claude_md.description: Path to the Mayor's CLAUDE.md for this rig. Supports ${VAR} interpolation.

FormulaRef.description: A scheduled Formula workflow attached to a rig.

name.description: Formula name, unique within the rig.

schedule.description: Cron schedule expression (5-field: min hour dom mon dow), e.g. "0 2 * * *".
